keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY MOUTH AND THROAT. Mouth and throat : Ap., Arg-n., Aru-t., Bar-c., Bell., Caust., Gels., Hep., Kali-bi., Lac-c., Lach., Lyc., Merc-c., Merc-cy., Merc-i-f., Merc-i-r., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Phyt., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Mouth and throat, right : Agar., Am-c., Ap., Bell., Bry., Carb-ac., Ign., Kali-m., Kre., Lyc., Merc-d., Merc-i-f., Merc., Phyt., Sang., Stan., Sul., Tarn. Mouth and throat, right , to left : Ap., Bell. , Caust., Lyc. , Merc-i-f. , Pho., Saba., Sang., Sul-ac. Mouth and throat, left : Calc-c., Caust., Crot-h., Diph., Fer., Hep., Kali-c., Lac-c., Lach., Mar-v., Merc-i-r., Naj., Petr., Pho-ac., Rhus-t., Saba., Sep., Sil. Mouth and throat, left, to right : Calc-c., Lach. , Merc-i-r., Rhus-t. , Stan. Mouth and throat, alternating sides : Alu., Arn., Cocc., Coloc., Lac-c., Pod., Sul. Mouth and throat, back of : Aco., Cocc., Kali-c., Merc., Nit-ac., Rhus-t. Mouth and throat, tonsils : Bar-c., Bell., Guai., Lach., Merc-i-f., Merc-i-r., Merc., Nit-ac., Phyt. Mouth and throat, tonsils, enlarged : Bar-c., Calc-f., Calc-io., Calc-p., Lyc., Merc-i-f., Merc-i-r., Merc., Nit-ac., Stap., Tub. Mouth and throat, tonsils, suppurating : Bell., Hep., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Sil., Tarn. Mouth and throat, adenoids : Agrap., Calc-c., Calc-p., Merc., Tub. Mouth and throat, eustachian tube : Fag., Hyds., Kali-m., Merc-d., Sang. Mouth and throat, eustachian tube, right : Hyds. Mouth and throat, eustachian tube, left : Sang. Mouth and throat, uvula : Ap., Kali-bi., Merc-c., Merc., Phyt. Mouth and throat, angina , simple sore throat : Aco., Bell., Merc-i-f., Merc., Pho., Sep. Mouth and throat, burning : Aco., Ars., Aru-t., Bell., Bor., Canth., Caps., Iris., Lach., Merc-c., Mez., Petr., Pho., Phyt., Sang., Sul., Ver-a. Mouth and throat, cheesy lumps from : Agar., Hep., Kali-bi., Kali-m., Kali-p., Mag-c., Merc-i-f., Psor., Sil. Mouth and throat, choking , constriction, spasms, narrow, as if : Arg-m., Bapt., Bell., Canth., Caust., Cham., Hyo., Ign., Lach., Laur., Lyc., Merc-c., Merc-i-r., Naj. , Nux-v., Pho., Plb., Spo., Stram., Sul., Ver-a. Mouth and throat, coated feeling : Carb-v., Pul. Mouth and throat, cold , agg. : Ars., Hep., Lyc., Merc-i-r., Rhus-t., Saba., Sil. Mouth and throat, cold, amel. (heat, agg.) : Ap., Ign., Lach., Merc-i-f., Phyt., Sang. Mouth and throat, cold taking, agg. : Bell., Dulc., Lach., Merc., Nux-v. Mouth and throat, cutting : Merc-cy., Nit-ac. Mouth and throat, dark : Aesc., Ail., Arg-n., Bapt., Crot-h., Lach., Phyt. Mouth and throat, diphtheria, tonsilitis , etc. : Ap., Ars., Kali-io., Lac-c., Lach., Lyc., Merc-cy., Merc-i-f., Merc-i-r., Mur-ac., Phyt., Rhus-t., Sul-ac. Mouth and throat, diphtheria, tonsilitis, laryngeal : Brom., Iod., Kali-bi., Lac-c., Lach., Merc-cy. Mouth and throat, diphtheria, tonsilitis, nasal : Kali-bi., Manc. Mouth and throat, dripping from uvula : Aral., Cepa., Cup., Kali-bi., Merc-c. Mouth and throat, dry , in general : Aco., Aesc., Bell., Bry., Lyc., Merc., Pho-ac., Pho., Sep., Stram., Sul., Ver-a. Mouth and throat, dry, with increased saliva : Alu., Aral., Kali-c., Lyc., Mag-m., Merc., Nat-m., Plb. Mouth and throat, dry, but no thirst : Ap., Bry., Cocc., Kali-c., Lyc., Nux-m., Nux-v., Pul., Spig. Mouth and throat, ear , extending to : Hep., Kali-bi., Kali-m., Lach., Merc-d., Merc., Phyt. Mouth and throat, fissures , cracks : Aru-t., Bell., Kali-bi. Mouth and throat, foam , from : Bell., Hyo., Ign., Stram. Mouth and throat, glistening : Ap., Kali-bi., Lac-c., Petr., Pho., Stram. Mouth and throat, hanging loose, as if, in (Comp. Fine.) : Alu., Iod., Lach., Pho., Plat., Saba., Sul., Val. Mouth and throat, hawking (mucus) : Arg-n., Caust., Con., Kali-bi., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Nat-c., Nat-m., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep. Mouth and throat, hawking, posterior nares, from : Hyds., Kali-bi., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Spig., Sul. Mouth and throat, hawking, sticky : Arg-n., Coc-c., Kali-bi., Lach., Mag-m., Phyt. Mouth and throat, inflamed : Aco., Bapt., Bell., Hyds., Merc-c., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Sul-ac. Mouth and throat, itching : Ap., Caust., Con., Nux-v. Mouth and throat, lifting , agg. : Caust., Sil. Mouth and throat, lump , plug, globus, etc. : Asaf., Hep., Ign., Lach., Lyc., Nat-m., Pul., Sep. Mouth and throat, lump, descends and rises, as she swallows : Alo., Asaf., Bar-c., Calc-c., Chel., Kali-c., Lac-c., Lach., Lil-t., Plb., Rum. Mouth and throat, nose , ascending to : Brom., Lac-c., Merc., Sep. Mouth and throat, odor from, bad breath : Arn., Ars., Aur., Bapt., Carb-v., Cham., Lach., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pul., Sul., Ver-v. Mouth and throat, open mouth : Ail., Ars., Bar-c., Colch., Hell., Hyo., Lach., Lyc., Mur-ac., Op., Rhus-t., Zin. Mouth and throat, paralysis , noisy swallowing, etc. : Caust., Cup., Gels., Hyd-ac., Lach., Laur., Pho., Thu. Mouth and throat, paralysis, palate : Gels. Mouth and throat, raw : Aru-t., Carb-v., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho. Mouth and throat, regurgitation : Ant-c., Asaf., Bry., Carb-v., Fer-p., Lach., Merc., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sul-ac., Sul. Mouth and throat, slimy : Bell., Caps., Chel., Lach., Merc., Petr., Pul. Mouth and throat, splinter , etc. as of a : Arg-n., Hep., Nit-ac. Mouth and throat, spot , dry, sore, etc. : Ap., Cimi., Cist., Con., Crot-h., Hep., Hyo., Lac-c., Lach., Lith-c., Merc-cy., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Pho., Phyt., Sil. Mouth and throat, sticky , clammy, pasty : Aesc., Bapt., Chel., Kali-bi., Lach., Myrt., Pho-ac., Pul., Sec-c., Sul-ac. Mouth and throat, swallowing , food lodges : Arg-n., Ars., Bar-c., Caust., Chin., Grap., Ign., Kali-c., Lyc., Nat-m., Pul., Sul. Mouth and throat, swallowing, returns through nose : Aru-t., Cocc., Gels., Kali-per., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Pho., Sul-ac. Mouth and throat, swallowing, urging to : Bell., Caust., Lach., Merc. Mouth and throat, swallowing, won't go down : Bar-c., Calc-c., Grap., Lyc., Sep. Mouth and throat, swelled : Ap., Lach., Merc., Nux-v., Pul. Mouth and throat, swelled, as if : Pul. Mouth and throat, ulcers , aphthæ, etc. : Ars., Bor., Kali-bi., Lach., Merc-c., Merc., Mur-ac., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sul-ac., Thu. Mouth and throat, upward through or from : Aco., Ars., Brom., Calc-c., Carb-v., Fer., Kali-bi., Kali-c., Lac-c., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Sep. Mouth and throat, valve . see Generalities.
